description: §18.6 — a value-form `match` whose `else` arm is the LAST arm SHALL NOT fire E-SYNTAX-010. Acceptance sibling of e-syntax-010-else-not-last-pos: `else` in the terminal position is the well-formed catch-all placement.
rationale: §18.6: an `else` arm at the bottom of the `match` block is the correct catch-all placement, so the else-position check is correctly silent.
